title: Squirrel Removal in Manhasset, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Manhasset, Long Island. Humane extraction, damage repair, and prevention. Licensed experts serving Manhasset estates and homes. Call today!
intro: Manhasset's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic estates provide the perfect habitat for squirrels, but when they invade your attic or walls, they can cause serious damage. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Manhasset, from Plandome Road to the Miracle Mile area. Our experienced technicians provide humane removal, entry point sealing, and complete attic restoration to protect your Long Island home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Manhasset homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of Long Island's squirrel behavior and seasonal patterns. Our licensed professionals use humane, effective methods and offer guaranteed results with same-day emergency service available throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Manhasset's mature oak and maple trees near the Americana Manhasset and throughout residential neighborhoods create ideal squirrel habitats that often lead to attic invasions in the area's historic homes and newer estates. The proximity to Manhasset Bay and abundant green spaces means squirrel activity remains high year-round, making professional exclusion services essential for property protection.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Manhasset?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Manhasset typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and initial cleanup. Homes with extensive attic damage or multiple squirrels may require additional restoration services.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Manhasset?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Manhasset and the surrounding Long Island areas. Emergency situations involving squirrels in living spaces or significant noise disturbances receive priority scheduling. Most initial inspections and trap placements can be completed within 24-48 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Manhasset homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage to Manhasset homes by chewing through roof soffits, fascia boards, and attic vents to gain entry. Once inside, they gnaw on electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damage insulation, contaminate areas with droppings and urine, and can destroy stored items. Their constant gnawing can also compromise structural wood elements in attics and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: Do you use humane methods for squirrel removal in Manhasset?
faqs.answer: Yes, we exclusively use humane, ethical squirrel removal methods in compliance with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and preventative sealing of all entry points. We never use poison or harmful methods that could endanger the animals or your family.
